title: Joyce Anne Boland, 50      Joyce Anne
summary: Joyce Anne Boland, 50 Joyce Anne Boland died July 29 at Contra Costa Regional Medical Center in Martinez, Calif. Ms. Boland was born Dec. 17, 1957, in Sitka, Alaska. title: CIRI hosted the 24th annual CIRI Golf Classic on Aug.
summary: CIRI hosted the 24th annual CIRI Golf Classic on Aug. 1 at Moose Run Golf Course in Anchorage.
